tests.text: Your h1 element should contain the text Working with the HTML Video Element.
tests.testString:
const h1 = document.querySelector('h1');
assert.strictEqual(h1?.textContent.trim(), 'Working with the HTML Video Element');

description:
U ovom radionici, kreiraćete HTML video plejer. Dostavljen vam je HTML šablon.

Create an h1 element and give it the text Working with the HTML Video Element.
